'''mafuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylonolactonase|xylonolactonase]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-f-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylonolactonase|xylonolactonase]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| mafuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæfikith|mæfikith]] || [[word:mæfikij|mæfikij]] || [[word:mæfikish|mæfikish]] || [[word:mæfiki|mæfiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mafufukuth|mafufukuth]] || [[word:mafufukuj|mafufukuj]] || [[word:mafufukush|mafufukush]] || [[word:mafufuku|mafufuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mafukuth|mafukuth]] || [[word:mafukuj|mafukuj]] || [[word:mafukush|mafukush]] || [[word:mafuku|mafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mafufkuth|mafufkuth]] || [[word:mafufkuj|mafufkuj]] || [[word:mafufkush|mafufkush]] || [[word:mafufkuf|mafufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mafukuthu|mafukuthu]] || [[word:mafukuju|mafukuju]] || [[word:mafukushu|mafukushu]] || [[word:mafukuku|mafukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mafukuth|mafukuth]] || [[word:mafukuj|mafukuj]] || [[word:mafukush|mafukush]] || [[word:mafuku|mafuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mafukuthul|mafukuthul]] || [[word:mafukujul|mafukujul]] || [[word:mafukushul|mafukushul]] || [[word:mafukukul|mafukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mafukuthuthu|mafukuthuthu]] || [[word:mafukujuju|mafukujuju]] || [[word:mafukushushu|mafukushushu]] || [[word:mafukuku|mafukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mafukuthun|mafukuthun]] || [[word:mafukujun|mafukujun]] || [[word:mafukushun|mafukushun]] || [[word:mafukukun|mafukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mafukuthuoro|mafukuthuoro]] || [[word:mafukujuoro|mafukujuoro]] || [[word:mafukushuoro|mafukushuoro]] || [[word:mafukukuoro|mafukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
